title: Damayanthi
subTitle: A young man struggles to pay off his father's debts and decides to visit his family's abandoned bungalow. However, he soon realises that it is haunted by a vengeful ghost.

title: Fever
subTitle: An assassin loses his memory in an accident. He wakes up knowing only his name, and a subconscious memory of a crime he has committed.

title: Striker
subTitle: Life changes for Surya, a young boy from Mumbai when he returns home following communal riots. He goes on to become a carrom champion and is pursued by Jaleel, head of a betting syndicate.

title: Neevevaro
subTitle: Kalyan, a chef who is visually impaired, promises to help Vennela, the woman he loves, after learning about her financial problems. However, he inadvertently ends up discovering her hidden truth.

title: Master Piece
subTitle: A young man falls in with the wrong crowd and strays from heroic deeds. However, an accidental encounter with danger forces him to change his ways.

title: Hum
subTitle: A man is determined to kill a cruel businessman to get revenge for his father's death but is stopped by an inspector who is the mastermind behind the troubles.

title: Bhagam Bhag
subTitle: Champak and his theatre troupe travel to London for a show. However, their plans go awry when they accidentally become pawns in a murder and drug conspiracy.

title: Inspector Vijay
subTitle: Vijay, an honest police officer, meets Samyukta at a cafe and falls in love with her. However, his life changes when he witnesses a kidnapping and ends up helping a lonely woman, Lavanya.

title: Big Brother
subTitle: Sachi dreams of a tranquil life with his family after serving his time in prison. However, fate has other plans for the ex-convict when he encounters a dangerous drug lord.

title: Thammudu
subTitle: A brother and a sister share a close bond. Later, when his sister faces multiple challenges in life, he strives to protect her at any cost.

title: Vijay Raghavan
subTitle: An honest IAS officer devotes his life to the upliftment of the youth in his locality. However, a corrupt businessman's ploy to poison these young minds compels him to challenge the criminal.

title: Vijay Raghavan
subTitle: An honest IAS officer devotes his life to the upliftment of the youth in his locality. However, a corrupt businessman's ploy to poison these young minds compels him to challenge the criminal.

title: Velaikkaran
subTitle: Arivazhagan, a slum dweller, works in a large food company. However, when he realises that they adulterate the food, he strives to fight them.

title: Purani Jeans
subTitle: Sam and Sid, two long-time best friends, fall in love with the same woman, Nayantara. What follows is a tragedy with Sam, for which Sid blames himself.

title: The Great Indian Butterfly
subTitle: Krish and Meera, a married couple, try finding the Great Indian Butterfly, which is a legendary insect that is rumoured to grant immense peace to the person who captures it.

title: Bazaar
subTitle: Kalki dreams of becoming a pigeon racing champion. However, his life takes a turn when he is torn between his dreams and the woman he loves.

title: Pankh
subTitle: A young boy, dressed as a girl for a film, becomes famous. However, he struggles to break free from his breakout role after growing up, leading him to live a troubled life.

title: Meri Jaan
subTitle: A young man faces challenges and attempts to recover his debts. However, in the process, he also realises that he is in love with someone.

title: Master Piece
subTitle: A young man falls in with the wrong crowd and strays from heroic deeds. However, an accidental encounter with danger forces him to change his ways.

title: Ram Setu
subTitle: Aryan, an archaeologist, is an atheist and publishes a controversial report on Rama Setu. Things take a turn when he sets out to prove its existence and becomes a believer in the process.

title: Saindhav
subTitle: A man with a traumatic past is compelled to encounter an crime boss so that he can rescue his daughter from a health problem.

title: DD Returns
subTitle: An event manager and his friends hide the money they stole in a haunted bungalow to evade the police but when they go back to retrieve it, the ghosts force them to play a dangerous game.

title: Devaki Nandana Vasudeva
subTitle: When a prophecy declares that his nephew will cause his downfall, Kamsaraja becomes worried and stops at nothing to take him down.

title: Siren
subTitle: After serving 14 years in prison, a man is released on parole. As he tries to reconnect with his family, he vows revenge against those who wronged him.

title: Siren
subTitle: After serving 14 years in prison, a man is released on parole. As he tries to reconnect with his family, he vows revenge against those who wronged him.

title: Vikram Hitlist
subTitle: A special agent investigates a murder committed by a masked group of serial killers. However, a tangled maze of clues soon leads him to the drug kingpin of Chennai.

title: Ek Zakhmi Romeo
subTitle: Ananya loves her best friend, Surya, while he falls for another woman, Pooja. However, after his heartbreak, Surya is too late to realise who truly loved him as Ananya rejects him.

title: The Great Indian Butterfly
subTitle: Krish and Meera, a married couple, try finding the Great Indian Butterfly, which is a legendary insect that is rumoured to grant immense peace to the person who captures it.

title: Marzi The Power
subTitle: Krishnaveni runs away from home to elope with her lover, Kishore, who does not show up. Gani, a self-centred man, plans to take her to her father, hoping to make a quick buck.

title: The Return of Abhimanyu
subTitle: A military officer borrows money from a bank using fake papers for his sister's marriage. However, when the money goes missing from his account, he begins an investigation that leads him to a hacker.

title: Seetharamam
subTitle: Afreen, a Pakistani woman, heads to India in order to deliver a love letter written in 1965 to fulfill her grandfather's dying wish. However, the journey alters her life forever.

title: Zombie Reddy
subTitle: Chaos ensue as Mario, a game developer, and his gang of friends get entangled in a family feud and an enigmatic zombie attack in Rayalaseema, while attending a friend's wedding.

title: Khatarnak Policewala
subTitle: After a priest's murder and a woman's abduction, ACP Vetrimaaran uncovers a ring linked to a fertility clinic. His investigation takes a personal turn when the conspiracy affects his own family.

title: Geethanjali Malli Vachindi
subTitle: Sreenu receives a directorial offer from Vishnu to shoot in a bungalow. Later, he and his crew realise that Vishnu orchestrated the ploy to seek revenge by trapping them in a haunted house.

title: Taqdeer
subTitle: Soon after Avinash manages to get the phone number of his childhood love Priya, his phone gets stolen by a gangster. So, he sets out on a dangerous chase in order to reconcile with his lover.

title: Khaidi No. 150
subTitle: Seenu, a criminal, escapes from the prison and places his doppelganger, Shankar, in his place. However, upon learning about Shankar's noble mission, he takes up the cause himself.

title: Gangs of Godavari
subTitle: An ambitious man named Lankala Rathnakar desires to rise to the top. However, to reach his goal, he must navigate through the murky waters of power and dirty politics.
